Before you open this PR:
- Is there a linked issue discussing this? (Required for non-trivial changes.)
- Is the diff < 300 lines? If not, can it be split?
- Have you read CONTRIBUTING.md?

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] Diff is focused on a single topic
- [ ] Manually tested end-to-end
- [ ] No personal data in the diff (real phone numbers, emails, names)
- [ ] UI changes include before/after screenshots
- [ ] AI-assisted? Disclosed in the description.
